---
title: "Journal Club"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Guidelines - Reading a Paper

1)  [Ten simple rules for reading a scientific paper](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1008032)
2)  [How to read a research paper](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S2666869625000028)
3)  [Infographic: How to read a scientific paper](https://www.elsevier.com/connect/infographic-how-to-read-a-scientific-paper)
4)  [How to read a scientific paper](https://www.science.org/content/article/how-read-scientific-paper)
5)  [How to (seriously) read a scientific paper](https://www.science.org/content/article/how-seriously-read-scientific-paper)

## Guidelines - Running a Journal Club

1)  [Establishing and sustaining an effective journal club](https://www.bjaed.org/article/S2058-5349(21)00128-1/fulltext)
2)  [Running a Journal Club](https://cahpr.org.uk/cahpr-top-ten-tips/running-a-journal-club/)
3)  [Journal Clubs: 1. Origins](https://ebm.bmj.com/content/22/6/231)
4)  [Journal Clubs: 2. Why and how to run them and how to publish them](https://ebm.bmj.com/content/22/6/232)

## Sample Presentations

*Coming Soon*

## Relevant Journals for Journal Club

*Coming Soon*

## Foundational Papers for Journal Club

*Coming Soon*
